entry.title: Re: add a field from marc table in top-of-page and alv report for CL11(display bom level by level)
entry.content: Do /H to make sure which program displays the ALV.

entry.title: BTP@China环境上的Redis on SAP BTP, Hyperscaler Option可面向客户提供！
entry.content:
Hyperscaler Option

2019年7月，我们目睹了SAP BTP战略的演进，强调构建具有差异化业务服务能力，并明确表示打算与超大规模云提供商合作，如Amazon、Microsoft,、AliCloud和GCP，提供开源数据库和数据存储等通用技术服务；而这些超大规模云提供商已经是市场领导者。

2020年2月，考虑到客户/合作伙伴关于BYOA（自带账户）方法面临的挑战的反馈，我们宣布了一项更新来调整支持服务策略，计划提供全面托管的支持服务：

  • Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

更多详细信息，请阅读SAP BTP Discovery Center和服务文档SAP Help Portal：

  • SAP Discovery Center - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Discovery Center - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

 

Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

在全球，Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option 是通过CPEA和PAYG的商业模式来为客户提供服务。在中国，则是通过Subscription的订阅方式。无论如何，现在BTP中国环境上的Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option服务已可面向客户提供！

您需要具有适当权限的Global Account才能使用Redis服务。

在您部署redis-cache实例时消耗的特定计划/SKU单位数量取决于所选择的计划和技术配置。

由于基础架构提供商提供的Redis服务存在差异，不同基础架构区域的SKU单位数量也会有所不同。

您可以选择使用标准（Standard）计划（基于2GB内存增加的实例）和高级（Premium）计划（基于4GB内存块的实例）。

对于中国地区，您可以参考SAP的帮助门户服务文档：服务计划和权限 阿里云实例配置选项。

 

使用方法

创建Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option实例

在确保您的实例被分配了足够的授权配额后，您可以使用CLI创建一个实例。或者，您可以通过SAP BTP Cockpit创建。

cf marketplace -e redis-cache
cf create-service SERVICE PLAN SERVICE_INSTANCE [-c PARAMETERS_AS_JSON]

例如：

cf create-service redis-cache standard redis-cache-instance -c
'{
  "memory": 2, 
  "engine_version": "4.0",
  "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
  "shard_count": 1,
  "node_count": 2
}'

针对BTP@AliCloud的注意事项：

  • 不支持6.0引擎版本。
  • 可以更新shard_count，但不允许将其从1（非集群）更新为2或更多（集群实例）。
  • 仅支持shard count大于1的Redis实例使用TLS连接。

创建服务实例后，根据需要检索实例的配置

cf service <service-instance-name> --guid //Note the service instance id
cf curl /v2/service_instances/<service-instance-id>/parameters

示例输出：

{
 "engine_version": "4.0",
 "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
 "memory": 2,
 "node_count": 1,
 "shard_count": 2
}

用Redis-cli访问Redis实例

cf enable-ssh <app-name>
cf restart <app-name>
cf create-service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf ssh -L 6666:<hostname>:<port> <app-name>
redis-cli [--tls] -c -p 6666 -a <instance-password>

更多详细信息：从Redis-cli访问Redis-cache实例

在Cloud Foundry应用程序中访问Redis实例

您可以按照BYOA（自带账户）方法进行。您可以通过应用绑定和应用运行时环境变量来获得Redis实例的详细信息。

相关的信息来源

  • 关于Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option的更多信息，请查看SAP Help Portal。
  • 关于Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option的定价、商业选项和地区的信息，请查看SAP Discovery Center。

entry.title: Which CDS view for material master - work scheduling view?
entry.content:
Hi, I'm searching for CDS view for data containing work scheduling view of material, namely production supervisor assignment to a plant-material. Does anyone know which CDS view to look?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Fiori Adoptation Project for Extending Standard Fiori Application for onPremise using BAS
entry.content:
Good post.

However it is worth to point out this approach is technically not a "Adaptation" project. It is rather a "legacy" way of extension provided by WebIDE initially now in BAS, which won't be applicable to most "modern" fiori apps.

Some more background information is here

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/extending-legacy-fiori-apps-in-bas/ba-p/13579887

entry.title: Re: Which CDS view for material master - work scheduling...
entry.content: I found in "I_ProductPlantBasic", resolved.

entry.title: Should I update materail master after MRP area customize
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We're doing ECC conversion to HANA.

Regarding PP area, as there is storage loaction MRP was used in ECC,
so I activated MRP area and created new MRP area for storage location.
after ran the report MRP_AREA_STORAGE_LOC_MIGRATION,
there has been no error.

The question is :
At the moment storage location MRP is still in material mater MRP4 view
and I haven't set MRP area in MRP1 view.
should I set MRP area manually in MRP1 view for all materail mater?
Or it will be updated automatically after conversion?
If I should set manually how do I get the list of material mater as there has been no error in MRP_AREA_STORAGE_LOC_MIGRATION, I cannot know which one was affected

Please check the Tax Number format for MX1.

Thanks,

Sairam

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Cancel Asset Capitalization through DI-API
entry.content:
Hi ibrey,

Try something as below:

 

 

Dim oService As SAPbobsCOM.CompanyService = oCompany.GetCompanyService()
Dim AssetService As SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentService = oService.GetBusinessService(SAPbobsCOM.ServiceTypes.AssetCapitalizationService)
Dim AssetDocument As SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocument = AssetService.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentServiceDataInterfaces.adsAssetDocument)
Dim AssetDocumentParams As SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentParams = AssetService.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.AssetDocumentServiceDataInterfaces.adsAssetDocumentParams)
AssetDocumentParams.Code = 25
AssetDocumentParams.CancellationOption = SAPbobsCOM.ClosingOptionEnum.coBySpecifiedDate
AssetDocumentParams.CancellationDate = "2024-03-01"
AssetService.Cancel(AssetDocumentParams)

 

 

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP CF Audit log viewer query
entry.content:
Hi Ivan,

Thank you!

We will move to premium plan in near future.

Regarding my query , from what I see in system, retention is not an issue. I can see logs from February. It is just that logs from Audit log viewer service are capped at 500 in result screen . Do you think there is a way to remove that upper limit? 

Do you think logging a ticket under BC-CP-CF-SEC-AUDITLG would help answer this?

Kind Regards,

Tasmeem

entry.title: Re: SAP standard transfers SD invoices to GTS system and...
entry.content: I suggest you create a Z table with the sales org/cocode combinations and field to mark X for the ones you want to make relevant for transfer. Then update your SD0C IFEX CTRL BADI with a line of code to read that table. If it finds the combination in the Z table, then send the proforma to GTS and if it doesn't, then do not transfer the proforma.

entry.title: Re: Shipping point cannot be used for plant
entry.content: good job

entry.title: Turning Strategy into Reality with Business Architecture
entry.content:
Day 3 of 30 Days of EA Learning

Abstract:

Whynde Kuehn underscores the criticality of Business Architecture in seamlessly translating strategic vision into executable blueprints. Advocating for a rigorous methodology, Kuehn accentuates the imperative for well-defined strategic objectives, cohesive endeavors, and lucid change management processes to guarantee triumphant strategy realization across the enterprise landscape, in alignment with SAP's Business Transformation strategies.

In this session:

From Vision to Execution: Mastering Strategy with Business Architecture.

Explore the indispensable role of Business Architecture in converting strategic intents into tangible outcomes with Whynde Kuehn at the SAP Enterprise Architects Forum 2024. Delve into a strategic execution framework that ensures precision, congruence, and clarity, fostering a structured and transparent approach to enterprise transformation and change management, as advocated by Kuehn.

Key Themes – AI Assisted: 

Leverage business architecture as the bridge for turning strategic vision into tangible outcomes.

  • Implement business architecture to ensure strategic plans are transformed into organized actions across all organizational levels.
  • Utilize it to fill the critical gap between strategy development and its practical execution, focusing on alignment across people, processes, information, and technology.

Shift from enumerating initiatives to actively building and enhancing strategic capabilities for effective strategy execution.

  • Prioritize the development and reinforcement of strategic capabilities over merely listing initiatives.
  • Encourage wrapping initiatives around these strategic capabilities, aiming for direct contributions to the organization’s strategic goals.

Champion strategy execution as a human-centric journey, prioritizing people and change management over mere architectural considerations.

  • Emphasize the importance of people and their experiences in the execution of strategies, advocating for a focus on change management and adaptive ways of working.
  • Recognize and address the human aspects of transformation to foster a supportive and engaged organizational culture.

Employ business architecture to form, translate, and keep strategy dynamic, guiding informed investment decisions through an enterprise perspective.

  • Use business architecture to maintain a living strategy that adapts over time, supporting effective translation from vision to execution.
  • Ensure strategic investments are aligned with organizational capabilities and strategic objectives, leveraging a comprehensive understanding of the business architecture.

Architect change collaboratively, developing a shared understanding of its implications for our business.        

  • Foster a collective approach to change, using business architecture to clarify and coordinate the transformation efforts.
  • Cultivate a shared vision of change across the organization, ensuring all efforts are aligned and contribute to the overarching business goals.

Remember:

The power of clear intent translated into organized effort can change the world.  It is what turns strategy into reality, making the seemingly impossible possible.  Business architecture gives organizations that power. -  Whynde Kuehn

Access Presentation: Here

Watch the YouTube Video of Whydne's Presentation: Here

 

Nugget of Next:

Watch for more information later this month on how to access the "Business Architecture for Enterprise Architects Masterclass" on demand. 

Flag Photo with Whynde:

entry.title: Re: Integration of LIMS with DM
entry.content:
Hi Syed, 

You can use SAP Digital Manufacturing APIs to integrate with your LIMS application. check SAP DM APIs here  SAP Business Accelerator Hub and stepwise approach to invoke APIs Prepare for API Integration | SAP Help Portal .

It depends on what data you want to integrate from LIMS and what are integration interfaces available to LIMS, can drive the integration.

Thanks

Rahul

entry.title: System status WCRE is active (ACT 1000020 0010)
entry.content:
Object ACT 1000020 0010 has system status WCRE (Work center until
release).  According to this status, transaction 'Release operation is
not allowed.

entry.title: How to activate scope item 4X9 in S/4 HANA 2023 on-premise
entry.content:
We just upgraded our system to S/4 HANA 2023 and we are trying to make 

We are trying to make Create Sales Orders - Automatic Extraction work on our system. However, there are two prereq for this app to work. 

  • The scope item 4X9 (Create Sales Orders from Unstructured Data) has been activated for SAP S/4HANA.
  • The scope item 4X9 has been set up to enable communication between SAP S/4HANA and Document Information Extraction.

Is there a tutorial or guide on how these prereq are done in S/4 Hana 2023 on premise system?

entry.title: Re: Email Notification after Screening Maintenance Request
entry.content:
Hi Dany,

Yes you are correct, there's no business workflow getting triggered in the screening of the Notification, so you won't be able to use any of that to trigger the email.

One option to look at might be to use the 'Situation Handling' capability in S/4 Public Cloud in order to 'notify a user' when an event has occurred (Business Object of Maintenance Notification has changed status).

Think of it instead of creating a 'workflow', its creating a 'situation' that can then have an action off the back of it (email recipient)

Situation handling will send a Fiori Launchpad notification, but it can also send emails.

In the Asset Management module, we do not currently have pre-built situation template for this, so you would need to use the Situation Handling - Extended Framework guidance here, along with the business role of a 'extensibility specialist', to build out this use case around the Maintenance Notification object.

To be transparent, I haven't built this out in my system yet, so would need to play around with the concept in more detail to check if its viable.

Tim

SS

entry.title: Any alternative CDS View for "I_Trrmonitor" and "I_SlsPerformancePlanActualCube" ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for an alternative CDS View which might be available in the Public Cloud System i.e "I_Trrmonitor" and "I_SlsPerformancePlanActualCube".

The CDS View "I_Trrmonitor" is not yet released to the customer for custom cds development; and "I_SlsPerformancePlanActualCube" is something which we cannot utilize as this makes use of the fields/values which upload in the system and in-turn gives us the values.

The main aim to utilize these 2 CDS view is for us to capture the fields "Planned Value" & "Actual Values" from our Customer projects based on the Sales Order.

Any leads on this would be appreciated.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Batch Management/Batch Determination
entry.content:
Dear All,                                                                                                                                                                 We are new to Batch Management.                                                                                                                 Here, ROH is in 3 batches, As a component for production order its picking up the ROH from 2nd batch.           Why its not picking up from either 1st or 3rd batch, what's the logic behind these ??

Please help regarding the scenario and for documentation to get more idea about process.

 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to populate custom field for app Manage Customer Line Items ?

entry.title: Redis on SAP BTP, Hyperscaler Option Now Available for Customers on BTP@China!
entry.content:
Hyperscaler Option

In July 2019, we witnessed an evolution of the SAP BTP strategy with a strong focus on building differentiating business service capabilities and clear intentions to partner with hyperscale cloud providers like Amazon, Microsoft, AliCloud and GCP for commodity technical services like open-source databases and data stores; where these hyperscalers are already market leaders.

In February 2020, considering customer/partner feedback about challenges with the BYOA (Bring Your Own Account) approach, we announced an update to the backing service strategy, with plans to deliver a comprehensively managed backing services offering:

  • Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

For more details please check SAP BTP Discovery Center and the service documentation on SAP Help Portal.

  • SAP Discovery Center - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Discovery Center - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option
  • SAP Help Portal - PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

 

Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option is globally available via CPEA and PAYG commercial models, for China is available via subscription commercial model. Now, Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option is available for customers on BTP@China!

You need to have a Global Account with the proper entitlements to be able to use Redis service.

The number of units of a particular plan/SKU that get consumed when you provision a redis-cache instance depends on the chosen plan and the technical configuration.

The number of SKU units also differ across infrastructure regions, because of the differences in the Redis service offered by the underlying infrastructure provider.

You can choose to use Standard plan (instances based on 2GB memory increase) and Premium Plan (instances based on 4GB memory blocks).

For China you can refer to Help Portal service documentation: Service Plans and Entitlements AliCloud instance configuration options.

 

Usage

Create Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option instance

After making sure that you have sufficient entitlements quota assigned for your instance, then you can create an instance with CLI. Alternatively, you can create via SAP BTP Cockpit.

cf marketplace -e redis-cache
cf create-service SERVICE PLAN SERVICE_INSTANCE [-c PARAMETERS_AS_JSON]

For example:

cf create-service redis-cache standard redis-cache-instance -c
'{
  "memory": 2, 
  "engine_version": "4.0",
  "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
  "shard_count": 1,
  "node_count": 2
}'

Notes for AliCloud region:

  • Engine version 6.0 not supported.
  • The shard_count can be updated, however it is not allowed to update it from 1 (non-clustered) to 2 or more (clustered instance).
  • Only Redis instances with a shard count of >1 support TLS connections.

 

Retrieve Configurations of Instance If Required Once the Service Instance is Created

cf service <service-instance-name> --guid //Note the service instance id
cf curl /v2/service_instances/<service-instance-id>/parameters

Sample output: 

{
    "engine_version": "4.0",
    "eviction_policy": "noeviction",
    "memory": 2,
    "node_count": 1,
    "shard_count": 2
}

 

Access a Redis-cache Instance from Redis-cli

cf enable-ssh <app-name>
cf restart <app-name>
cf create-service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf service-key <instance-name> <key-name>
cf ssh -L 6666:<hostname>:<port> <app-name>
redis-cli [--tls] -c -p 6666 -a <instance-password>

For more details: Access a Redis-cache Instance from Redis-cli

 

Connect to Redis Instance in Cloud Foundry Application

You can do it in the same way as the BYOA (Bring Your Own Account) approach. You can consume the Redis instance via app binding and the app runtime environment variable.

 

Relevant Sources of Information

  • For more information on Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option service, please check SAP Help Portal.
  • For information on Redis pricing and commercial options and regions, please check SAP Discovery Center.

entry.title: Re: Need Out-of-the-box reports for Treasury
entry.content:
Good morning!

Check to following path in SAP Menu: Information Systems -> Accounting -> Treasury 

The main reports are:

  1. TPM12 - Position List
  2. TPM13 - Position Flow List
  3. TPM20 - Posting Journal, TPM20A - Payment Journal 
  4. TPM40A - Position Overview , TPM40
  5. TM_60 - Lines of Credit and Utilization , TM_60A - Lines of Credit, Drawings and Charges

entry.title: PRT details not coming from ERP to DM
entry.content:
Hi experts,

As I explained in the last blog - the local PRTs that have been created in our system are not automatically getting copied over to the routing details of newly released orders even though we are using merge routing order processing mode.

Now we have created a PRT material in ERP -> transferred it to DM -> created Tools on the same material -> Released new orders by assigning PRT to operation in ERP itself. But still, when the orders are received in DM, it does not have the PRT details attached to them on the routing level. This we verified from the manage Routings app and the Tool validation plugin on the POD. 

ISSUE: We are unable to receive PRT details from ERP to DM attached with operations. How to resolve this? I've attached all the screenshots for reference. 

PRT assignment to operation in ERP

Order Downloaded

No PRT in the routing level

Note: PRT Material created in ERP is transferred to DM and TOOL has been created on that.

Please let me know if we are missing some config or if there are any more prerequisites to getting PRT in routings from ERP. Any help will be valuable.

Thanks & Regards,
Harsh

Thanks,

Vishal

Thank you for any suggestions.

ERP is ECC6.0 EHP 8 SP19

Regards G.

entry.title: Re: System status WCRE is active (ACT 1000020 0010)
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: How to unsubscribe other employee from Web Service Me...
entry.content: Hi Muheed, yes we will need to log in as the user to unsubscribe for him 🙂

entry.title: Local(DM) PRT material stock not getting updated on TOOL usage.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have created a few PRT-type materials and followed this blog to configure all TOOL-related setups. As of now all the functionalities revolving around TOOLs are working as mentioned in the blog above. Now I've also created Floor Stocks using the "Manage Floor Stock" app for the 4 material PRT. 

My Scenario: Take an example of an equipment PRT - Welding machine and a material PRT - Welding electrode. Now there are no "stocks" per se for the Welding machine but as the Welding electrode is a consumable, I'd like to have a stock of the same and also track its usage in terms of how much of the received stocks is now available on hand. 

Issue: I've created the stocks for PRT materials. But it's not getting updated whenever I'm using the tools. So the question is - Does this even happen or not? Is it possible to track the available no of equipment prt and stock of material prt? 

Any help will be valuable and do let me know if more info is required from my side. Please let me know if this scenario is possible or not. And if it is possible, then how to achieve it?

Thanks & Regards,
Harsh.

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Instance Deleted from Trial althoug...
entry.content: I am also facing the same issue.

entry.title: SAP BPC default logic for SAP BPC Embedded
entry.content:
HI Team,

Any idea how we can achieve "Default logic" (retained earning Script logic) - BPC standard consolidation .  for retained earning in BPC embedded?

Your help is highly appreciated.

Thanks,

Rahul

entry.title: Re: TU for delivery assignment / not found
entry.content:
Hi,

I guess you have TM-EWM integration.
Maybe the source of the issue is that the XML message incoming from EWM fails because the ERP delivery is not updated with the HU items created by EWM. TM checks whether all packages we receive from the loading end message are also part of the respective deliveries.

The HU update flag is necessary to be enabled in customizing to ensure that ERP deliveries are updated with HU info.

There is also a blog about the topic:

‘Early Updates’ with packing information in TM – EWM Integration with EWM Transportation unit in S/4HANA 2021 Release

entry.title: Re: Error during oData API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV in SAP Integ...
entry.content: Hi Ivan, thanks for you support. I read the notes already, but didnt find a solution for my problem. I dont send json nor xml unfortunately. The WebService expects no body expect the file for the attachment. I have also switched to a HTTP Receiver, but getting the same error 😞 Any idea ?

entry.title: Re: Billing schema debugging

entry.title: Re: How can I create a column with "Direct Links" to clas...
entry.content: Hi @SF-Dan, thanks for the quick reply. Of course you are right: Class IDs are always numeric. And in the select statements "a.schd_id" will be replaced with the numeric class id, whenver the script is executed. And thanks for the hint regarding the PRD exchange group. I will also post there... Thanks, Uwe

entry.title: Capitalizing on AI: The Future of Industries
entry.content:
As one delves into the comprehensive examination of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its implementation across various industries, it's evident that capitalizing on AI's capabilities could be a game-changer for companies. The recent advancement of AI from simply a buzz term to a practical reality is revolutionizing numerous sectors, including transcription software, customer service, translation, writing, and social media marketing.

Not only has this technological shift been advantageous for businesses, but it has also positively influenced stock growth for companies heavily invested in AI. Nevertheless, amidst the benefits, there are valid concerns about AI's potential misuse. For instance, creating fake videos and spreading misinformation can be particularly hazardous during electoral periods.

As AI continues its game-changing course, a potential digital divide is looming between those without access to AI and the internet. In response to this rapidly evolving industry, it becomes critical to upscale ourselves with AI capabilities to stay in line with digital advancements.

Attention is drawn to Generative Pre-trained Transformers (GPT), an advanced AI that harnesses immense internet data for sharper decision-making. However, there is an evident risk of data accuracy in GPT due to biased internet content or misinformation. Despite these challenges, GPT's data processing capacity trumps human capabilities, promising a future filled with advancements.

Prospects are also being explored for AI to communicate in everyday language, eliminating the need for specific technical jargon. Moreover, it's essential to maintain data accuracy and reliability by seeking validation and citation when utilizing AI for information generation.

The future looks promising with personalized experiences based on individuals' preferences as AI matures. There's a significant shift towards artificial general intelligence (AGI), where systems may possess logical and thinking abilities similar to the human brain. As professionals, we are urged to stay abreast of AI development and their influential role in our everyday lives.

For more such research, you can follow my newsletter here.

entry.title: Re: Data structures of Sustainability Control Tower metrics
entry.content:
Hi,

Is this link still valid? Could you tell where can I find the demo data?

Regards,

Arpan

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CREATE1 No Error But Not Creating
entry.content: As Sandra recommenfs: After calling a BAPI function, check the RETURN parameter. If no error is recorded, call function BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT, in case of error call function BAPI_TRANSACION_ROLLBACK. This is a quite old ABAP principle: Database updates are done asynchronous in background task not before the transaction has been COMMITed. This helps to ensure database consistency if more than one database table is involved in update process. Also processing speed is gained because database updates are done in background while the processing in foreground already continues. 50 years ago this was essential.

entry.title: SAP DM Execution Plugin for Production Process with Input/Output Variables
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have developed an execution plugin to be used in a production process (productionProcessEnabled). It is visible in the production process designer. But unfortunately, I do not find a way to add input and output fields to the execution plugin. Has any of you succeeded in doing so, or found an article/blog that describes how to do this?

Thank you very much in advance,
Stephan

entry.title: Re: Deletion of Master and Transactional Data (ILM) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud,Public Edition-Link Collect
entry.content:
Hi @Saumitra,

Thanks for the summary blog of ILM, really clear and helpful.
We can use t-cd DB15 to easily find an archiving object for a table, or find the table by giving the object in on-premise.
Is there any similar function we can use in S/4HANA public cloud?

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Stuttgart
entry.content:
Brought to you by SAP Community members, the SAP Stammtisch is an informal meetup everyone can participate: SAP users, developers, consultants and architects - come and join us and bring a friend.

Register here!

*Please note that this event entry is a summarized version of the original event and your registration may be required by the organizer shared on the original event website. RSVP accuracy here is without guarantee and does not constitute registration. However, if you want to earn an SAP Community badge, please leave your RSVP here as well.

entry.title: Re: Payment And Clearing via electronic bank statement
entry.content:
@YoussefRehab 

Hi Youssef, 

This Help portal content might be intersting to you and answer some of your questions. It's about the automatic bank statement processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/9929e3049c88402a8d56e437a3967e38.html?locale=en-US 

Best regards,

Anita

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA PCE different ADS connection for output manag...
entry.content:
Hi Ralph,
by default the RFC destination with the name ADS will be used for most ADS operations.
Please rename you existing ADS connection and rename the ADS_HEC connection to ADS.

Best regards
Pascal

entry.title: TSCUBE does not load data due to leading 0
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have plant code - 07120 (5 digit) in cube . When I create CVC via cube then CVC is created with plant code - 7120 (4 digit).

Now I am doing TSCUBE to load the data from cube to planning area but it is not happening.

TSCUBE is not finding any CVC ( as plant code is 07120 in cube and 7120 in Planning Area).

Please suggest how CVC can be created with leading 0.

Thanks,

Prabhat

entry.title: Re: FSV with functional and gl account to be consumed in Analysis for Office
entry.content:
Hi Joseph,

I'm also doing the same I have added GL's in the FSV and using hierarchy nodes in Bex I'm extracting data. But I'm still adding GL's manually in the Bex. Which I don't feel it's needed. Can you tell me is it working for you like that or not?

 

Regards,

Saima Afreen

entry.title: SAP HANA Data Provisioning Learning Journey
entry.content:
According to a survey that SAP conducted with customers a few years ago, over 70% of IT decision-makers don't even know where data actually resides within their systems.

Of course, this is not due to a lack of competence on the part of those surveyed, but rather to the historically grown, heterogeneous system landscapes that have emerged in their organizations over time. In other words, your data is distributed across multiple ERP, Datawarehouse, Big Data and other source systems. This inevitably raises an important question for many SAP customers: What is the best way to get data that I want to use into my target system?

Most of the people would now think of SAP Integration Suite. But there is another option, SAP HANA`s native data provisioning capabilities with the main tools Smart Data Access and Smart Data Integration. Join now our new learning journey "Provisioning Data to SAP HANA" and familiarize yourself with the feature scope of the provided tool set.   

SAP Product Learning CoE Analytics Team

entry.title: How can I access what user group a user is assigned to?
entry.content: In BTP ABAP Environment, how can I access the user group that the user is assigned to? As far as I can tell, the field (table usr02, field class) is only included in view entity P_BPUsrDetail as field UserGroup. However, neither the table nor the view entity has a C1 contract so I cannot access it. Is there a released object that allows access to this detail?

entry.title: SAP Fiori (APP Server)のvCPU数増強について
entry.content:
皆様

閲覧いただきありがとうございます。

【背景】
Rise With SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private EditionにてSAP Fiori (APP Server)のTシャツモデルを
以下に増強したいです。（現在はLサイズになります。）
・メモリ：64GB⇒128GB
・vCPU数：16⇒32

【質問】
以下の製品を契約した場合、メモリは64GB追加されますが、
vCPU数については、16⇒32に増強されるのでしょうか。

[PROD]
8018042
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Application Server for Linux, additional production tenant, upgrade

[QAS : Non PROD]
8018051
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Application Server for Linux, additional nonproduction tenant, upgrade

もしご存じの方がいらっしゃればご意見や情報の共有を頂けると大変ありがたいです。
お手数おかけいたしますが何卒宜しくお願い致します。

【補足】
なお、上記製品でvCPU数が増強されない場合は、以下の契約に置き換えることで
L⇒XLにサイズアップされることになると考えています。
■現在
8008864
SAP Fiori Hub on ASE Cloud, private edition (L)

■変更後
8008865
SAP Fiori Hub on ASE Cloud, private edition (XL)

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。

Kazumi

entry.title: Service Marketplace is not missing
entry.content:
Hi, 

I've recently ran into an issue where my service marketplace is not showing on the sap cockpit trial account anymore. I've been using cockpit for about a year now always renewing the 90day trial but this is the first time I came into the issue. 
I have about 20days left of the trial and it just disappeared yesterday, I haven't changed my roles or anything. I saw some people on the community with this issue and their resolution were role based but I can't figure it out even with adding and removing role collections, etc.

entry.title: Difference between SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 5 REV 59.08 and SAP HANA 2.0, SPS 7
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Hi, everyone what is the difference between SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 5 REV 59.08 and SAP HANA 2.0, express edition 2.0 SPS 07.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Transport Guideline
entry.content:
For anyone reviewing this blog in 2024, permissions are not part of the import and export process.  Some blogs contradict this but the official SAP guidance document is correct:

a) Report permissions will not be updated in 'Overwrite' mode
b) Report permissions will inherit those of the folder being imported into (if 'Drop Objects' is selected for import)
c) Folder permissions will never be updated and you cannot 'Drop' a folder using 'Drop Objects' import option.

Thanks
Ian.

entry.title: Re: blind scan
entry.content: For example, I will do 3 x 3 sudoku and with the values I set fixed in my program, the program will scan each row and column and give me the output when it places the appropriate numbers. so there will be no user interaction.                                                   I am looking for such a simple code, where can I actually find it?

Dear Community,

I am not able to install SAPHANA Studio from SAPHANA official website. I got this below link but it is giving me the error as below

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/download-and-installation-of-sap-hana-studio-2-0-sp3-with-abap-bw/ba-p/13389976

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Announcing SAP’s plans for a next generation Governance, Risk, and Compliance Plat
entry.content:
Hi Rob,

We are actually not sunsetting anything, which you can hopefully tell based on our new product release.

And while we cannot yet give a definite answer on end of maintenance for the new product, kindly be assured that we will share the details as soon as they are available.

We will always give our customers sufficient time to plan ahead (that is why we share updates at the earliest possible with not having all details available such as EOM, or naming, etc.) and have no intention to leave any customer behind.

Be assured, that the new product release is intended to stay, just as the history and evolution of our GRC products demonstrates.

Thanks for your kind understanding,

marie-luise

entry.title: Re: blind scan
entry.content:
Sudoku solving algorithms - Backtracking (brute-force search) - Wikipedia:

"A brute force algorithm visits the empty cells in some order, filling in digits sequentially, or backtracking when the number is found to be not valid. Briefly, a program would solve a puzzle by placing the digit "1" in the first cell and checking if it is allowed to be there. If there are no violations (checking row, column, and box constraints) then the algorithm advances to the next cell and places a "1" in that cell. When checking for violations, if it is discovered that the "1" is not allowed, the value is advanced to "2". If a cell is discovered where none of the 9 digits is allowed, then the algorithm leaves that cell blank and moves back to the previous cell. The value in that cell is then incremented by one. This is repeated until the allowed value in the last (81st) cell is discovered."

entry.title: Re: method CMD_EI_API=>MAINTAIN_BAPI to update KNVI tax data
entry.content:

I have tried like that, but tax Classification in BP is still not inserted. Are there any addition to do before those codes?

entry.title: make field "production plant" mandatory in COHV
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking for a solution to make the field "plant" mandatory in tcode COHV.

Unfortunately, I was not able to track down the tcode anywhere in SPRO, also the suggested work-around with tcode SHD0 does not work here, as it only let's me adjust the fields in the header:

 

 

Is there any other way to make the field "production plant" mandatory in this tcode?

Thanks and best regards!
Tim

entry.title: Re: New Version of SAP Readiness Check for SAP BW/4HANA Is Now Live
entry.content:
Hello Astrid,

 we implemented last week the new Readiness Check central note 3061594 on our BW 7.5 on HANA System. however we encounter an issue while transporting The implemented Note Analyser from Test to Production-System.

Transport-error -> 
Programm SAPLRS_B4HANA_CODESCAN: Syntaxfehler Zeile 000000
Das Programm 'SAPLRS_B4HANA_CODESCAN' ist gemäß den Programmattributen nicht unicodefähig.

Can you please tell us, what we should do in this case?

Thank you ? Best regards

Valerie

entry.title: Not able to print or save document over button "print view" in transaction ME22N
entry.content:
Dear guys,

I need your help.
A user has troubles with the "print view" button in the transaction ME22N (see attachement "Screenshot 1").
When the user klicks on the "print view" button he has the possibility to see, print and save a PDF order confirmation in principle.

The problem is that it seems like he has no authorization to print or save the PDF (see attachement "Screenshot 2").
As you can see, the print and save button are grey which means that the user is not able to use the functionality to print or save.

We already tried to execute the transaction SU53 to see if some permissions are missing but SU53 says that the last authorization check was sucessful...

I am not sure if the problem is a SAP problem or if we talking about some Acrobat Reader problems or something.
But in my opinion it is more likely not a SAP problem since the error message in the attachement "Screenshot 2" is in German (but my SAP language is English).

Any ideas what could be the problem?
Thanks in advance!

BR Thomas

entry.title: Re: Restrict some IP (BTP data center IP) for Outbound Ca...
entry.content:
Hello Aman,

you can enter the receiving party API/SFTP address as a cloud to on-prem connection on your cloud connector. Then you can use this connection in your Iflows like any other cloud to on-prem connection.

By doing that the request is send from the CPI to the cloud connector and from there to the receiving party.

This can be a solution for your issue, if the cloud connector use a static IP or connects via a proxy, that has a static IP address, to the internet. Only in this case you can share this IP address with your receiver and they can whitelist it.

 

best regards

 

Robert Quindt

entry.title: Re: Joining us from the AppGyver Forum? Start here in the SAP Builders Group!
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Bundles Now Live in SAP for Me - A Breakthrough in Outage Communication!
entry.content:
Hi,

great to see this functionality I've heard of during the DSAG BTP Betriebstag already live. During that session I've asked if MTAs deployed to Cloud Foundry could appear directly as Bundles. Because an MTA combines most of the time the UI, Application and used Services into one deployable unit. So it would make sense to re-use this collection as a Bundle in me.sap.com.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Order release error - Message no. C2039
entry.content: SAP Error message No. C2039 due to material activated with serial number configuration. if you want to remove such kind of error message check with T code MM02 (work scheduling profile view) in this view serial number profile is assign with respective material. Then By using T code OIS2 (identify the serial number ranges and assign it to production order) then system will allow you to release Production.

entry.title: Re: SAP UX Innovations in Public Cloud Products, Joule, AI, Entry Points, Apple Vision Pro and more
entry.content:
Dear Sundeep,

The feature "Copy and Paste in SAPUI5 tables" is available with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01, with the SAPUI5 version 1.120. I have described this along with many other features in my blog post User Experience Advances with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 (Private Cloud and On-Premise).

Regards,

Tom
